name: Diwali
product_suggestions: Gold and maroon color palette designs
prep_message_30d: Start preparing Diwali collection — your biggest sales opportunity of the year.
prep_message_15d: Highlight festive wear prominently. Promote gift-ready packaging and combos.
prep_message_7d: Push high-value designs via WhatsApp and Instagram. Offer fast delivery.
notes: Biggest ethnic wear festival across India. Demand peaks 2 weeks before Diwali.

name: Navratri
prep_message_30d: Stock Navratri-specific chaniya choli and colorful salwar suits for Gujarat and Rajasthan customers.
prep_message_15d: Promote Navratri colors — each day has a specific color. Create color-wise collections.
prep_message_7d: Last push — offer same-day or next-day delivery for last-minute buyers.
notes: Nine nights of dance and celebration. Each day has a traditional color. Very high demand for chaniya choli.

name: Eid ul-Fitr
prep_message_30d: Eid collection should be ready. Focus on anarkali suits, sharara sets, and chikankari.
prep_message_15d: Promote via WhatsApp status and Instagram Reels. Share lookbooks of Eid collection.
prep_message_7d: Urgency push — 'Get your Eid outfit now!' campaigns. Offer express delivery.
notes: Major festive occasion. Families buy complete sets. White and pastel tones dominate.

name: Durga Puja
prep_message_30d: Prepare Bengali ethnic wear and traditional sarees for Durga Puja season.
prep_message_15d: Focus on red-white combinations and traditional Bengali styles.
prep_message_7d: Promote Puja-special sarees and suits. Offer quick dispatch.
notes: Biggest festival in Bengal. Multiple outfit changes across 5 days. Very high demand.

name: Onam
product_suggestions: Kerala kasavu sarees (cream with gold border)
prep_message_30d: Onam is Kerala's biggest festival. Stock kasavu sarees and white ethnic wear immediately.
prep_message_15d: Focus marketing on Kerala customers. Promote kasavu and traditional sets.
prep_message_7d: Final push for Onam — 'Onam Specials' campaign. Highlight light cottons and kasavu.
notes: 10-day harvest festival. Traditional white with gold border (kasavu) is the dominant look. NRI orders spike 6 weeks before.

name: Pongal / Makar Sankranti
product_suggestions: Cotton salwar suits in bright colors
prep_message_30d: Pongal collection should include Kanjivaram silks and bright cotton sets for South India.
prep_message_15d: Target customers in Tamil Nadu and Andhra. Promote traditional silk sarees.
prep_message_7d: Last-minute Pongal buyers — offer express delivery and gift wrapping.
notes: Harvest festival. Families buy silk sarees as gifts. Traditional over contemporary.

name: Raksha Bandhan
product_suggestions: Salwar suit sets as gifting options
prep_message_30d: Raksha Bandhan gifting season — create curated gift sets of ethnic wear.
prep_message_15d: Push gifting angle — 'Gift your sister an ethnic outfit'. Promote combos and sets.
prep_message_7d: Last-minute gift buyers. Offer gift wrapping and express delivery. Push on WhatsApp.
notes: Major gifting occasion. Brothers buy ethnic wear for sisters. Gift packaging is key.

name: Wedding Season (Nov–Feb)
product_suggestions: Bridal lehengas and heavy embroidered sarees
prep_message_30d: Wedding season is approaching — your highest-revenue period. Stock bridal and guest wear now.
prep_message_15d: Wedding season is here! Promote bridal collections, family sets, and guest wear.
prep_message_7d: Peak wedding season. Run targeted ads. Offer customisation and quick delivery.
notes: Nov–Feb is India's prime wedding season. Auspicious dates cluster in November and February. Highest ticket-size sales.

name: Holi
prep_message_30d: Holi brings demand for light, affordable cotton and printed ethnic wear.
prep_message_15d: Push affordable Holi outfits. Light colors and comfortable fabrics.
prep_message_7d: Last-minute Holi buyers — focus on affordable, quick-delivery options.
notes: Festival of colors. Demand is for affordable, light ethnic wear that can get colorful. Not high-end.

name: Eid ul-Adha (Bakrid)
prep_message_30d: Eid ul-Adha — second major Eid. Similar demand to Eid ul-Fitr. Prepare embroidered ethnic sets.
prep_message_15d: Focus on formal and festive ethnic wear. Promote premium collections.
prep_message_7d: Final push for Bakrid customers. Offer express delivery and gift wrapping.
notes: Second major Eid. Slightly less demand than Eid ul-Fitr but significant in Muslim-majority areas.
